title: Woman in Silver
content:
Woman in Silver
 is a 
Celestial
 from the 
Ancient Celestial Realm
.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.2

Links and References

Background
[
]

In the past, she was a part of the 
Seven-Colored Sect
. She was deployed to the Ancient Celestial Realm. She supposedly opened the seal on the 
Seven Colour Sect's Cave World
 and allowed cultivators from the Immortal Astral Continent which ultimately resulted in 
Su Dao
's death and current chaos between the Outer and 
Sealed Realm
.

History
[
]

Book Eight
[
]

Wang Lin
 first saw her when she was being used as a corpse puppet by the 
Cultivation Alliance
 during the war between the 
Alliance Star System
 and the 
Allheaven Star System
. He stole her from the Alliance's control during the chaos of the war.

Later, he had her guard him while he cultivated to reach the late-stage of 
Nirvana Scryer
 before returning to the 
Demon Spirit Land
.

When Wang Lin encountered the 
Flower Imperial Concubine Han Yan
, she spoke for the first time and her advise allowed Wang Lin to placate the Flower Imperial Concubine. She even gave him the location of 
Qing Lin
's seal.

Book Nine
[
]

When Wang Lin entered the 
Seven-Colored Realm
 inside the 
Cloud Sea Star System
, he fooled 
Master Ashen Pine
 and the others and secretly followed them. He broke through the imitation 
Life and Death Restriction
 placed by 
Old Woman Zhao
 with the help of the Woman in Silver who was able to use the authentic Life and Death Restriction. He tried to soul-search her to understand her origin but was blocked from doing so by Su Dao's seal.

In the 
Outer Realm
, Wang Lin obtained Su Dao's statue from 
Greed
. When he showed the statue to the Woman in Silver, she had a mental breakdown and passed out in sheer terror while yelling, "I didn't open the door!"

Book Twelve
[
]

Immediately after Wang Lin took 
Lian Daofei
 and Woman in Silver out of his storage space after entering the 
Immortal Astral Continent
, 
Lian Daozhen
 sensed Lian Daofei's aura and teleported the latter to him. He was surprised that she was with Lian Daofei but thought that she could become his maid.
